items.rationale: Celebrated Matter Labs (zkSync) milestone as a major win for the whole ecosystem, signaling enthusiasm for ZK-based Ethereum scaling.

citations.quote: Congrats to @gluk64 and the entire @the_matter_labs teams! What a phenomenal accomplishment for the entire ecosystem!

items.rationale: Hailed the Filecoin Virtual Machine (FVM) launch as a major advance in decentralized storage and compute capabilities.

citations.quote: the launch of #FVM. This is a tremendous step forward in advancing the capabilities of decentralized storage and compute

items.rationale: Joined AllianceDAO as a contributor to help build the next generation of Web3 and DeFi startups; sees the space as still early-stage with strong developer growth.
items.age_note: Core stance stated Jan 2022; not explicitly restated in 2023, but consistent with his ongoing a16z crypto and ecosystem-celebration posture, so treated as persisted.

citations.quote: Excited to be a contributor to @alliancedao. Looking forward to being part of building the next generation of Web3 and defi startups.
Love @ElectricCapital's annual analysis of Web3 developer activity. By any measure, we are still early days.

items.rationale: Sees gaming as a powerful on-ramp for bringing people into new crypto ecosystems and economies.
items.age_note: Stated once in Oct 2021 (Axie context) and never restated; ~18 months old. Conviction reduced for age and lack of reinforcement.

citations.quote: amazing the power that gaming can have in terms of onboarding people into the new ecosystems/economies

items.rationale: Publicly congratulated the Filecoin community on the FVM launch, framing it as a tremendous step forward for the network.

citations.quote: Congratulations to @momack28, @juanbenet, @colinevran & the entire @Filecoin community on today's launch of #FVM.

risk_regime.rationale: As an a16z crypto team member and AllianceDAO contributor, his statements are consistently builder-optimistic — celebrating ecosystem launches (zkSync, Filecoin FVM) and framing crypto as 'still early days' with no expressed caution about valuations or downside, even through the 2022-2023 bear market.

notes: Corpus is dominated by non-crypto personal/consumer-tech posts (Google/Pixel work, F1, Star Wars, health wearables) which were excluded. The crypto signal is sparse but directionally clear and builder-oriented. Most recent crypto views (Feb-Mar 2023): ZK scaling (Matter Labs) and decentralized storage/compute (Filecoin FVM) — these are weighted highest. No concerns or bearish statements about any sector or token appear anywhere in the corpus; this is a one-sided enthusiasm signal, consistent with a venture-investor public posture rather than a trading view. No conflicting/reversed stances detected. Several entries are 'persisted' (older, unrestated) and discounted accordingly. No explicit token price views; FIL inferred from network/launch enthusiasm, not a market call.
